creator: makc@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi David, kdesvn installs the same files as kdesdk4 (e.g. 
share/kde4/services/svn*.protocol). Could these files not to be 
installed by kdesvn? Otherwise we should mark conflict for kdesvn and 
kdesdk4.  Have you checked plist when NOPORTDOCS is defined?
